Interface IUtilityNetworkQueryDefinition

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that supply utility network query definition information.

[Guid("C8B8BCD5-0F60-4A6C-A374-E62CEEA3A686")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IUtilityNetworkQueryDefinition

Properties

FeatureClassUsageType[esriElementType, int]

Returns the utility network feature class usage type for the source.

esriUtilityNetworkFeatureClassUsageType FeatureClassUsageType[esriElementType ElementType, int SourceID] { get; }

Parameters

ElementType esriElementType
SourceID int

Property Value

esriUtilityNetworkFeatureClassUsageType
